_doc: Copy templates per feature. Variables: {topic} = user's prompt (truncated to 4 words), {audience} = user's audience. Tier modifiers are appended to the base body.

ai-models.title: Upgrade to a better AI model
ai-models.body: Generate higher quality slides for your {topic} deck. Better AI means sharper content, smarter layouts, and more polished output for {audience}.

brand-kit.title: Set up your Brand Kit
brand-kit.body: Apply your brand colors and fonts across every slide. Your {topic} deck looks like yours, not a template.

unbranded.title: Use unbranded Pro templates
unbranded.body: Professional templates without the Presentations.AI watermark. {audience} see your content, not our branding.

export.title: Export your deck
export.body: Download your {topic} deck as a PowerPoint or PDF. Ready to email to {audience}, present offline, or print.

invite-collab.title: Invite collaborators
invite-collab.body: Add people to your {topic} deck for real-time editing. Get a second opinion before it goes to {audience}.

analytics.title: Turn on viewer analytics
analytics.body: See who in {audience} opened your {topic} deck, which slides they viewed, and how long they spent.

gen-speed.title: Upgrade generation speed
gen-speed.body: Generate your {topic} deck at Medium or Fast speed instead of Slow. Less waiting, faster iteration.

pres-refresh.title: Refresh your presentation
pres-refresh.body: Regenerate your {topic} deck with improved content and structure. A fresh version without starting from scratch.

hire-team.title: Let us build it for you
hire-team.body: Our team will create a polished {topic} deck for {audience}. You focus on the message, we handle the design.

tierModifiers._doc: Appended to body based on user's countryTier. Tier 1 = quality-focused messaging. Tier 2 = value/efficiency-focused messaging.

tier1.ai-models: Enterprise-grade AI for polished, boardroom-ready output.
tier1.brand-kit: Pixel-perfect brand consistency across your entire library.
tier1.unbranded: Clean, professional finish that matches your brand standards.
tier1.export: Presentation-ready files that look exactly as designed.
tier1.invite-collab: Streamlined review workflow for your team.
tier1.analytics: Detailed engagement insights for data-driven follow-ups.
tier1.gen-speed: Priority generation so your workflow stays uninterrupted.
tier1.pres-refresh: AI-powered content refresh with structure preserved.
tier1.hire-team: White-glove service from our expert presentation team.

tier2.brand-kit: Set it once, reuse across every deck — no redesign work.
tier2.unbranded: Look established without hiring a designer.
tier2.export: Send it anywhere — no workarounds needed.
tier2.invite-collab: Get feedback in one place instead of email chains.
tier2.analytics: Know exactly who engaged — no guessing.
tier2.gen-speed: Get your deck ready in minutes, not hours.
tier2.pres-refresh: Update your deck without rebuilding from zero.
tier2.hire-team: Save days of work for less than you think.
